scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WORKER,DASH,PUBLIC" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green,yellow" --kill-others-on-fail "cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm dev" "cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm dev:worker" "cd crelyzor-frontend && pnpm dev" "cd crelyzor-public && pnpm dev"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names "API,WORKER,DASH,PUBLIC" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green,yellow" --kill-others-on-fail "cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm dev" "cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm dev:worker" "cd crelyzor-frontend && pnpm dev" "cd crelyzor-public && pnpm dev"
scripts.install:all: cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm install && cd ../crelyzor-frontend && pnpm install && cd ../crelyzor-public && pnpm install
scripts.build:all: cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm build && cd ../crelyzor-frontend && pnpm build && cd ../crelyzor-public && pnpm build
scripts.lint:all: cd crelyzor-backend && pnpm lint && cd ../crelyzor-frontend && pnpm lint && cd ../crelyzor-public && pnpm lint
